summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustLens Structural Upgrade features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed covering suspicion score calibration (5 factors), enhanced pulse endpoint (5 fields), PDF export, case contribution, and case stats. Frontend: All 5 pulse questions verified with sliders, mini suspicion ring working, Download PDF button present on shared report page.

issues: Subtitle says 'Answer three quick questions' but now there are 5 questions - minor text inconsistency

passed_tests: Backend: Suspicion score with phone_secrecy+emotional_distance+schedule_changes+defensive_behavior+sudden+multiple returns 70-95
Backend: Signal intensity component contributes to suspicion score (>= 30 with high-intensity signals)
Backend: Pattern match count from case DB contributes to score via case_comparison
Backend: POST /api/analysis/pulse accepts all 5 fields (emotional_connection, communication_quality, perceived_tension, behavioral_changes, trust_feeling)
Backend: Low trust/connection + high tension/changes returns pulse_suspicion >= 50
Backend: High-strain pulse recommendation mentions 'deep analysis'
Backend: Healthy pulse inputs return low pulse_suspicion (< 25)
Backend: GET /api/reports/{id}/pdf returns 200 with content-type application/pdf
Backend: PDF export returns 404 for non-existent report
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute accepts valid case and returns TL-U prefixed case_id
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute rejects invalid outcome with 400
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute rejects missing required fields with 400
Backend: All 5 valid outcomes accepted (confirmed_infidelity, emotional_disengagement, misunderstanding, personal_crisis, unresolved_conflict)
Backend: GET /api/cases/stats shows >= 300 cases (300 seeded + contributed)
Backend: Case stats returns outcome_distribution with all 5 outcome types
Backend: Results endpoint case_comparison.insights contain dynamic text from case matching
Frontend: Pulse page shows all 5 slider questions with correct data-testids
Frontend: Pulse page has Emotional Connection slider (data-testid=slider-emotional_connection)
Frontend: Pulse page has Communication Quality slider (data-testid=slider-communication_quality)
Frontend: Pulse page has Perceived Tension slider (data-testid=slider-perceived_tension)
Frontend: Pulse page has Behavioral Changes slider (data-testid=slider-behavioral_changes) - NEW
Frontend: Pulse page has Trust Level slider (data-testid=slider-trust_feeling) - NEW
Frontend: Pulse results show mini suspicion ring with pulse_suspicion score
Frontend: Pulse results show recommendation text
Frontend: Pulse results show Deep Analysis CTA button (data-testid=deep-analysis-btn)
Frontend: Shared report page has Download PDF button (data-testid=download-pdf-btn)
action_items: Minor: Update RelationshipPulse.jsx subtitle from 'Answer three quick questions' to 'Answer five quick questions' (line 213)
critical_code_review_comments: Suspicion score calibration correctly implements 5 weighted components: signal intensity (max 45), pattern matches (max 20), contradictions (max 10), timeline (max 15), baseline (max 10)
Pulse endpoint correctly calculates pulse_suspicion from all 5 inputs using strain_score formula
PDF generation uses reportlab with proper styling and all report sections
Case contribution validates outcome against 5 valid types and generates TL-U prefixed case_id
Case comparison insights are dynamically generated based on actual matching cases from MongoDB
seed_data_creation: 300 relationship cases auto-seeded on startup. Additional test cases contributed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All structural upgrade features verified working. Backend APIs: suspicion score calibration (5 factors), pulse endpoint (5 fields + pulse_suspicion + recommendation), PDF export via /api/reports/{id}/pdf, case contribution via POST /api/cases/contribute. Frontend: Pulse page has 5 sliders, results show mini suspicion ring with score/100, Deep Analysis CTA button present. Shared report page has Download PDF button. Minor text inconsistency in pulse page subtitle mentioning 'three' instead of 'five' questions.
mocked_api_note: AI analysis uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with fallback to hardcoded responses. Case database is REAL (300+ generated cases in MongoDB). PDF generation is REAL using reportlab library.
